text:
## Team Context

**Your assigned name**: spec-developer-frontend-workspace
**Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach it)

**Communication Protocol** (you have SendMessage in your tools):
- `QUESTION: ...` — before starting, if requirements have genuine ambiguity
- `BLOCKER: ...` — immediately if you cannot proceed
- `DONE: {summary}` — when your deliverables are complete
- `SUGGESTION: ...` — proactively flag tech issues, arch concerns, refactoring ideas

**Context Strategy**: repomix
All relevant context is pre-loaded. Use Read/Glob/Grep for additional files.

**Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first.
**Team culture**: Your domain expertise is valued. Speak up.

## Tasks (6 tasks, do them all sequentially)

### Task 1: notesaner-s2j — User Settings Pages
Settings UI for user preferences, editor settings, and workspace configuration.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Settings modal with sidebar navigation
- Profile settings: display name, avatar, email change
- Editor settings: font size, font family, line height, tab size
- Theme settings: dark/light, custom CSS
- Keybindings: view and override shortcuts
- Plugins page: installed plugins, toggle enable/disable, settings per plugin
- Workspace settings (admin only): name, slug, auth providers
- User management (admin only): list, invite, remove members
- Keyboard shortcut: Cmd+, to open settings

### Task 2: notesaner-00gj — Workspace Member Management UI
UI for managing workspace members and permissions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Members list page in workspace settings
- Show: avatar, name, email, role, joined date
- Invite member: email input, role selector, send invite button
- Role change: dropdown per member
- Remove member: confirmation dialog
- Pending invites section
- Resend invite email
- Member activity: last active date

### Task 3: notesaner-43q — Status Bar with Note Information
Status bar at bottom of workspace showing contextual information.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Word count for current note
- Character count
- Reading time estimate
- Cursor position (line:column)
- Current mode (edit/preview/source)
- Sync status indicator (syncing/synced/offline)
- Plugin status items (registered via plugin SDK)
- Active collaboration count (N users editing)
- Click on items for more detail

### Task 4: notesaner-jek — Ribbon with Quick-Action Icons
Leftmost vertical strip of icon buttons for frequent actions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Default ribbon icons: File Explorer toggle, Search, Graph, Daily Note, New Note
- Plugin-registered ribbon icons
- Tooltip on hover showing action name
- Active state for toggle actions
- Reorder ribbon icons via drag
- Show/hide individual icons in settings

### Task 5: notesaner-3ez — Workspace Layout Persistence
Save and restore complete workspace layout across sessions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Layout config stored server-side in Layout model
- Auto-save on layout change (debounced 2s)
- On login: restore last layout
- Layout includes: open tabs per pane, split configuration, sidebar widths, open panels
- Named layout presets: save current as preset, load preset
- Shared layouts: share layout config with workspace members

### Task 6: notesaner-r0x — Note Version History Diff Viewer
UI for viewing and comparing note versions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Version history panel (in right sidebar or modal)
- Version list: date, author, change size
- Diff view: side-by-side or unified diff
- Added lines in green, removed in red
- Preview version content before restore
- Restore to version button with confirmation
- Version labels/messages support

## Project Info
- Next.js 15, React 19, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS 4, Zustand, TanStack Query
- Project root: /Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner
- Frontend: apps/web/src/
- UI components: packages/ui/src/components/
- Workspace features: apps/web/src/features/workspace/
- Shared API: apps/web/src/shared/api/
- Shared stores: apps/web/src/shared/stores/
- Existing WorkspaceShell: apps/web/src/app/(workspace)/WorkspaceShell.tsx

## Key Architecture Decisions
- Feature-Sliced Design: app > features > shared
- Use shadcn/ui components from packages/ui
- State management: Zustand stores in shared/stores/
- API calls: TanStack Query hooks wrapping shared/api/ functions
- Use existing sidebar-store.ts, tabs-store.ts, pane-store.ts patterns
- Workspaces API: apps/web/src/shared/api/workspaces.ts

Write tests where applicable in __tests__/ directories.
summary: Settings UI + member mgmt + status bar + ribbon + layout persistence + version diff
